verdict.note: issue #60 reproduced: a Task-subagent PreToolUse payload (real captured payload — top-level agent_id, parent session_id) fed through dispatch.sh flips the parent's parked declaration to active and wipes the note; the following Stop is then blocked by stop-gate as 'undeclared stop' (exit 2). Payloads captured live from claude 2.1.207 running a real Task subagent.

note: re-filing against the HEAD that carries the scenario declaration
